name: Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Baking soda, dissolved in water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the white flour, bran, cornmeal, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the skim milk, molasses, and baking soda dissolved in water until well combined.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined. Add raisins if using.
4. Divide the batter evenly among a greased or lined muffin tin.
5. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
